lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Welcome back friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How goes your fight with the trolls?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: I'm afraid I have bad news. We made our attack as planned, but we met unexpected resistance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We were ambushed by trolls coming from the north. They captured Dunstan's son, Godric, who we enlisted at your request; we tried to follow but we were repelled at the foot of their stronghold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The way to the stronghold is treacherous, friend. Even if you manage to climb your way up, there will be many trolls defending the stronghold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get Godric back!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: God speed friend! I would send some of my men with you, but none of them are brave enough to follow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that.

sections.title: Talking to Denulth after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: How are you getting on with rescuing Godric?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't found a way to climb up yet.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hurry, friend! Who knows what they'll do with Godric?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Tenzing!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Hello again traveller. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Sure, I'll sell you some in your size for 12 gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, sounds good.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Was there anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the money on me.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Was there anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Was there anything else?

sections.title: Climbing the rocks north of the Death Plateau

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: No human pass through arena without defeating Dad!

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: What tiny human do in troll arena? Dad challenge human to fight!

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Troll named after first thing try to eat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I accept your challenge!

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Tiny human brave. Dad squish!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eek! No thanks.

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Coward. Dad wait for braver fighter.

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Stop! You win. Not hurt Dad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be going now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not done yet! Prepare to die!

sections.title: Talking to Denulth again before freeing the prisoners

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Welcome back friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found my way into the prison.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: ...and?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hurry, friend. Find a way to free Godric!

lines.speaker: Twig
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?

lines.speaker: Berry
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?

lines.speaker: Eadgar
lines.text: Thanks! I'm off back home!

lines.speaker: Godric
lines.text: Thank you, my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have freed Godric!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Oh, what great news! You should hurry to tell Dunstan, he will be overjoyed!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Has Godric returned home?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: He is safe and sound, thanks to you my friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad to hear it.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: I have very little to offer you in way of thanks, but perhaps you will accept this family heirloom. It was found by my great-great-grandfather, but we still don't have any idea what it does.
